title: lindera benzoin var. aestivalis
intro: Lindera benzoin var. aestivalis, also known as American spikenard or aromatic spicebush, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lindera benzoin var. aestivalis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lindera benzoin var. aestivalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
